name: pr5-cancel-mechanism
title: PR5: LLM 打断机制 (cancel_chat command + CancellationToken + stop 按钮)
description: spike #4 (P0 架构改动). AppState 加 Arc<Mutex<HashMap<request_id, CancellationToken>>>;新 cancel_chat Tauri command;stream.next().await 用 tokio::select! 包裹 token。前端加 stop 按钮调 cancel_chat + sending 状态机加 cancelled 区分。已收到的 tokens 仍然 persist_turn 落 DB 不丢。~120 行。父 task: 06-06-spike-005-follow-up
creator: carlos
